headline: CPC Launches Everis DC Full-Flow Connectors for High-Performance AI Cooling
summary: CPC (Colder Products Company), part of PSG, a Dover company (NYSE: DOV), and a leading manufacturer of connection technologies used in liquid cooling of electronics, today announced the launch of the Everis® DC Series, a family of full-flow connectors designed to support the increasing thermal demands of artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing infrastructure.

headline: Dover (DOV) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
summary: Manufacturing company Dover (NYSE:DOV) will be reporting earnings this Thursday morning. Here’s what investors should know.
